SEARCH
Package edu.najah.software.service

Class AppointmentServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AppointmentService
public class AppointmentServiceImpl extends Object implements AppointmentService
Implementation of the AppointmentService interface. This class handles appointment booking, cancellation, modification, slot management, validation rules, and observer notifications. It uses:
  • Strategy Pattern for booking rules
  • Observer Pattern for notifications

  • Constructor Details

    • AppointmentServiceImpl

      public AppointmentServiceImpl(AppointmentRepository repository, AuthService authService)
      Constructs an AppointmentServiceImpl object. Initializes booking rules, observer list, and appointment type rules.
      Parameters:
      repository - repository for appointments
      authService - authentication service

  • Method Details

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(Observer observer)
      Adds an observer to the notification list.
      Specified by:
      addObserver in interface AppointmentService
      Parameters:
      observer - observer to add

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(Observer observer)
      Removes an observer from the notification list.
      Specified by:
      removeObserver in interface AppointmentService
      Parameters:
      observer - observer to remove

    • getAvailableSlots

      public List<TimeSlot> getAvailableSlots(LocalDate date)
      Returns all available appointment slots for a specific date.
      Specified by:
      getAvailableSlots in interface AppointmentService
      Parameters:
      date - required date
      Returns:
      list of available slots
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the administrator is not logged in

    • bookAppointment

      public Appointment bookAppointment(String id, LocalDateTime dateTime, int duration, int participants, AppointmentType type)
      Books a new appointment with a type. General booking rules and appointment type rules are validated before saving the appointment.
      Specified by:
      bookAppointment in interface AppointmentService
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      dateTime - appointment date and time
      duration - duration in minutes
      participants - number of participants
      type - appointment type
      Returns:
      booked appointment
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails

    • bookAppointment

      public Appointment bookAppointment(String id, LocalDateTime dateTime, int duration, int participants)
      Books a new appointment without specifying a type.
      Specified by:
      bookAppointment in interface AppointmentService
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      dateTime - appointment date and time
      duration - duration in minutes
      participants - number of participants
      Returns:
      booked appointment

      public void cancelAppointment(String appointmentId)
      Cancels an upcoming appointment.

      Parameters:
